title: Someone Very Special Silver Guardian Angel Memorial Tribute Stick Graveside Plaque Ornament
features: A pretty angel graveside or garden memorial tribute stick ground plaque for 'Someone Very Special'
The sticks are designed to be placed in memorial flower pots or in the ground around the memorial.
A peaceful and decorative way of remembering someone special.
36cm H (including the stand) The Angel Measures: 10cm x 10cm
description: Product Description Angraves - Honouring Lives, Cherishing Memories At Angraves Memorials , we understand that a memorial is more than just a marker—it is a lasting tribute to a cherished life. We believe every life deserves to be remembered with dignity and care. Specialising in memorial ornaments, plaques, and custom memorials. We understand that choosing a memorial is a deeply personal decision, and we take great pride in guiding families with care and sensitivity. From classic designs to fully customised designs, we ensure every memorial reflects the unique story of the person it honours. Our memorials are perfect for gardens, cemeteries, and outdoor spaces , offering a range of classic and personalised designs to suit any tribute. Whether you're looking for a traditional plaque or a unique commemorative piece, our collection provides meaningful ways to celebrate cherished memories.
